payload.raw_value_text: Total overtime was $2.4 million unfavorable to the Forecast

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

payload.claim_text: Non-reimbursable overtime was $4.5 million unfavorable and reimbursable was $2.1 million favorable. Unfavorable non-reimbursable overtime was primarily driven by scheduled service needs, vacancy coverage requirements and higher programmatic maintenance.
payload.subject: overtime

payload.claim_text: The largest number of vacancies by functional categories were in Operations (64) and Administration (41).
payload.subject: staffing vacancies

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $18.4 million favorable to the Forecast due to increased ridership volumes across all East of Hudson lines.
payload.subject: farebox revenue

payload.claim_text: Other Operating Revenues were $20.8 million unfavorable to the Forecast, which primarily reflects the timing of receiving Metro-North's portion of the local subsidy to cover pension prepayment partially offset by higher net Grand Central Terminal (GCT) retail and advertising revenues combined with the recognition of the CRRSAA grant covering April 2021.
payload.subject: other operating revenue

payload.claim_text: Adjusted Fare Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees.
payload.subject: adjusted performance indicators

payload.description: Steven Weiss, Financial Liaison, prepared the Financial and Ridership Reports – July 2023

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of this general ledger and are subject to change. Actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results. Differences are due to rounding.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments not yet captured; audited results not available
